WinWinFishPrawnCrabRules.Rule1: Win Win Fish Prawn Crab is a 6-reel (4 rows in reels 1 and 6, 5 rows in reels 2, 3, 4 and 5) video slot featuring increasing multiplier and consecutive wins during free spins.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{10000} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minChip} and %{maxChip} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 10000 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8

WinWinFishPrawnCrabRules.Rule3: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the "Paytable"
WinWinFishPrawnCrabRules.Rule4: A bet way win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by the bet size and bet level.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabRules.Rule5: Simultaneous wins on different bet ways are added.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabRules.Rule6: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spins symbol.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabRules.Rule7: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

WinWinFishPrawnCrabFeatures.MultiplierExplain1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabFeatures.MultiplierExplain2: During any spins, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1 .
WinWinFishPrawnCrabFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3, 4 or 5 Free Spins symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 3, 4 or 5 lives respectively. A maximum of 5 lives can be triggered at a time during the Free Spins Feature.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabFeatures.FreeSpinExplain3: Every free spin will reduce the number of lives by 1.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabFeatures.FreeSpinExplain4: Any free spin with win will reset the number of lives to its maximum value.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabFeatures.FreeSpinExplain5: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabFeatures.FreeSpinExplain6: The Free Spins Feature ends when the number of lives reaches zero.

WinWinFishPrawnCrabCommonRule.WinExplain1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabCommonRule.WinExplain2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol are calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols on each symbols from the leftmost reel to the right.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabCommonRule.WinExplain3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabCommonRule.WinExplain4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
WinWinFishPrawnCrabCommonRule.WinExplain5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
